### Candidate Lemmas

The following lemmas are admitted and in scope under the names shown. Apply any that are useful to close the proof.

[L0] (xs : List ℕ) (h1 : x ∈ ins1 x [] ∧ ((y : ℕ) → (ys : List ℕ) → (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) → ((h : x = y) → x = y) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x ∈ ins1 x ys))) : x ∈ ins1 x xs

[L4] (h1 : ((h : x = y) → x = y ∨ x ∈ ys) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x = y ∨ x ∈ ins1 x ys)) : x ∈ if x = y then y :: ys else y :: ins1 x ys
[L5] (h1 : ((h : x = y) → x = y) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x = y ∨ x ∈ ins1 x ys)) : x ∈ ins1 x (y :: ys)
[L6] (xs : List ℕ) (y : ℕ) (ys : List ℕ) (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) (h1 : ((h : x = y) → x = y ∨ x ∈ ys) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x = y ∨ x ∈ ins1 x ys)) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
[L7] (xs : List ℕ) (h1 : x ∈ ins1 x [] ∧ ((y : ℕ) → (ys : List ℕ) → (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) → ((h : x = y) → x = y) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x = y ∨ x ∈ ins1 x ys))) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
[L8] (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) (h : x = y) (h1 : x = y) : x ∈ if x = y then y :: ys else y :: ins1 x ys

[L10] (xs : List ℕ) (h1 : x ∈ ins1 x [] ∧ ((y : ℕ) → (ys : List ℕ) → (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) → ((h : x = y) → x ∈ y :: ys) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x ∈ y :: ins1 x ys))) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
[L11] (h1 : ((h : x = y) → x ∈ y :: ys) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x ∈ ins1 x ys)) : x ∈ if x = y then y :: ys else y :: ins1 x ys
[L12] (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) : x = y ∨ x ∈ ins1 x ys
[L13] (h1 : ((h : x = y) → x = y) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x ∈ y :: ins1 x ys)) : x ∈ if x = y then y :: ys else y :: ins1 x ys
[L14] (x : ℕ) (xs : List ℕ) (h1 : x ∈ ins1 x []) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
[L15] (xs : List ℕ) (y : ℕ) (ys : List ℕ) (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) (h1 : ((h : x = y) → x = y) ∧ ((h : ¬x = y) → x ∈ y :: ins1 x ys)) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
[L16] (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) (h : x = y) (h1 : x = y) : x ∈ ins1 x (y :: ys)
[L17] (x : ℕ) (xs : List ℕ) (y : ℕ) (ys : List ℕ) (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) (h : ¬x = y) (h1 : x = y ∨ x ∈ ins1 x ys) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
[L18] (x : ℕ) (xs : List ℕ) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
[L19] (xs : List ℕ) (y : ℕ) (ys : List ℕ) (ih : x ∈ ins1 x ys) (h1 : x ∈ if x = y then y :: ys else y :: ins1 x ys) : x ∈ ins1 x xs

### Output Format & Requirements

Your output MUST follow this structure exactly:

<used_lemmas>

**Requirements:**
1. `<reasoning>` is OPTIONAL. Include it only if it aids proof construction.
2. `<used_lemmas>` is REQUIRED. List the **0-based indices** of the candidate lemmas you applied (e.g. `0,2`), or `none` if you did not use any.
3. `<lean4_proof>` is REQUIRED. It must contain ONLY the tactic body — no `theorem` declaration, no `:= by`, no ``` fences. Your output is indented and placed directly after `:= by` in the compiled file.
4. No `sorry` or `admit` in the proof body. All Lean 4 code must type-check (the admitted candidates are provided in the environment separately).
5. Follow the tag structure exactly. No extra text before, between, or after the tags.
